name: 🎼 Memory lane 🎵
description:
Welcome to 🎵 memory lane 🎼

A Roblox game where it inspired by Dandy's world!

FIRST i have something to tell, English may not be my first Language as i am a Filipino but to communicate to my Workies I'll learn English and will Speak English most of the Time, don't bother me for not Speaking my native Language LOVE YA! :D

HAPPY NEWS YEARS!

Come and explore the characters amongst the world of memory lane!

Meet Characters that aren't friends to each other. Meet grumpy ones here, and more you can explore!

Honestly. Tell me in the Reviews if something is wrong with me since I'm the only who's testing this bot in here. I do have one in character.ai too. The one with the same imagine with this one, yeah that's mine.

Every character here isn't added yet so let me slowly update it if you want!

Just be patient..

Okay?

!!DINOSAUR ATTACK!!

(..Just, imagine.. that.. this is Shelly from Dandy's world in her Dino Skin.. Shhhh..)

ABOUT:

I've had made this bot for fun, you can suggest me anything you want because I'm mainly doing this for the fun, just check my Bio first because you need to know which Fandoms I'm in or used to know.

Pretty much learning some words here, The drawing was shown first was made by me, by the way, Give me some feedback about the characters.

BUT FIRST! here are commonly mistakes that I've had discovered while talking to the Characters. SO PLEASE READ THIS, I'LL UPDATE THIS IF I SEE A FREQUENT MISTAKE.

REQUEST CHARACTER:

If you want to Ask me where I can Request a Character, you can click this Line here
